name: square_expansion
statement: theorem square_expansion (a b : ℝ) : (a + b)^2 = a^2 + 2*a*b + b^2

name: difference_of_squares
statement: theorem difference_of_squares (a b : ℝ) : a^2 - b^2 = (a - b) * (a + b)

name: cube_expansion
statement: theorem cube_expansion (a b : ℝ) : (a + b)^3 = a^3 + 3*a^2*b + 3*a*b^2 + b^3

name: sum_of_cubes
statement: theorem sum_of_cubes (a b : ℝ) : a^3 + b^3 = (a + b) * (a^2 - a*b + b^2)

name: square_of_difference
statement: theorem square_of_difference (a b : ℝ) : (a - b)^2 = a^2 - 2*a*b + b^2

name: trans_inequality
statement: theorem trans_inequality (a b c : ℝ) (h1 : a ≤ b) (h2 : b ≤ c) : a ≤ c

name: add_inequalities
statement: theorem add_inequalities (a b c d : ℝ) (hac : a ≤ c) (hbd : b ≤ d) : a + b ≤ c + d

name: linear_combination_bounds
statement: theorem linear_combination_bounds (x y : ℝ) (hx : x ≤ 3) (hy : y ≤ 5) : 2*x + 3*y ≤ 21

name: antisymmetry_equality
statement: theorem antisymmetry_equality (a b : ℝ) (h1 : a ≤ b) (h2 : b ≤ a) : a = b

name: interval_membership
statement: theorem interval_membership (x a b : ℝ) (h1 : a ≤ x) (h2 : x ≤ b) (h3 : a = b) : x = a

name: square_positivity
statement: theorem square_positivity (x : ℝ) (hx : x > 0) : x^2 > 0
description: Square of positive number is positive

name: am_gm_two
statement: theorem am_gm_two (a b : ℝ) (ha : a ≥ 0) (hb : b ≥ 0) : a^2 + b^2 ≥ 2*a*b

name: quadratic_nonneg
statement: theorem quadratic_nonneg (x : ℝ) : x^2 - 2*x + 1 ≥ 0
proof:
have h : (x - 1)^2 = x^2 - 2*x + 1 := by ring
rw [← h]
exact pow_two_nonneg _

name: square_sum_inequality
statement: theorem square_sum_inequality (x y : ℝ) : x^2 + y^2 ≥ 2*x*y

name: cubic_monotonic
statement: theorem cubic_monotonic (x y : ℝ) (h : x ≤ y) (hx : 0 ≤ x) : x^3 ≤ y^3
proof:
have hsq : x^2 ≤ y^2 := by nlinarith
nlinarith
description: Cubic function is increasing for x≥0

name: nat_le_trans
statement: theorem nat_le_trans (a b c : ℕ) (h1 : a ≤ b) (h2 : b ≤ c) : a ≤ c

name: nat_add_comm_bound
statement: theorem nat_add_comm_bound (a b : ℕ) : a + b ≤ a + b + 1

name: nat_lt_of_lt_of_le
statement: theorem nat_lt_of_lt_of_le (a b c : ℕ) (h1 : a < b) (h2 : b ≤ c) : a < c

name: nat_add_lt_add_right
statement: theorem nat_add_lt_add_right (a b c : ℕ) (h : a < b) : a + c < b + c

name: nat_bound_deduction
statement: theorem nat_bound_deduction (n m : ℕ) (h1 : n ≤ 5) (h2 : m ≤ 3) : n + m ≤ 8

name: transitive_equality
statement: theorem transitive_equality (a b c d : ℝ) (h1 : a = b) (h2 : b = c) (h3 : c = d) : a = d
proof:
calc
  a = b := h1
  _ = c := h2
  _ = d := h3

name: calc_with_rewrite
statement: theorem calc_with_rewrite (a b : ℝ) : (a + b) - b = a
proof:
calc
  (a + b) - b = a + (b - b) := by ring
  _ = a + 0 := by ring
  _ = a := by ring

name: calc_square_expand
statement: theorem calc_square_expand (x : ℝ) : (x + 1)^2 = x^2 + 2*x + 1
proof:
calc
  (x + 1)^2 = x^2 + 2*x*1 + 1^2 := by ring
  _ = x^2 + 2*x + 1 := by ring

name: calc_inequality_chain
statement: theorem calc_inequality_chain (a b c : ℝ) (h1 : a ≤ b) (h2 : b ≤ c) : a ≤ c
proof:
calc
  a ≤ b := h1
  _ ≤ c := h2

name: division_cancel
statement: theorem division_cancel (a b : ℝ) (hb : b ≠ 0) : (a / b) * b = a

name: fraction_addition
statement: theorem fraction_addition (a b c : ℝ) (hc : c ≠ 0) : a / c + b / c = (a + b) / c

name: fraction_multiplication
statement: theorem fraction_multiplication (a b c d : ℝ) (hb : b ≠ 0) (hd : d ≠ 0) : (a / b) * (c / d) = (a * c) / (b * d)

name: arithmetic_identity
statement: theorem arithmetic_identity : (7 + 5) * (3 + 2) = 60

name: power_computation
statement: theorem power_computation : 2^10 = 1024

name: factorial_computation
statement: theorem factorial_computation : (5 * 4 * 3 * 2 * 1) = 120

name: sum_of_squares_pos
statement: theorem sum_of_squares_pos (x y : ℝ) (hx : x > 0) (hy : y > 0) : x^2 + y^2 > 0

name: square_plus_positive
statement: theorem square_plus_positive (x : ℝ) (hx : x > 0) : x^2 + x + 1 > 0

name: positive_product
statement: theorem positive_product (x y : ℝ) (hx : x > 0) (hy : y > 0) : x * y > 0

name: cube_of_positive
statement: theorem cube_of_positive (x : ℝ) (hx : x > 0) : x^3 > 0

name: sum_of_positives
statement: theorem sum_of_positives (x y z : ℝ) (hx : x > 0) (hy : y > 0) (hz : z > 0) : x + y + z > 0

name: modus_ponens
statement: theorem modus_ponens (P Q : Prop) (hPQ : P → Q) (hP : P) : Q
description: Modus ponens: P→Q and P yields Q

name: hypothetical_syllogism
statement: theorem hypothetical_syllogism (P Q R : Prop) (hPQ : P → Q) (hQR : Q → R) : P → R
proof:
intro hP
apply hQR
apply hPQ
exact hP

name: conjunction_intro
statement: theorem conjunction_intro (P Q : Prop) (hP : P) (hQ : Q) : P ∧ Q

name: disjunction_elim
statement: theorem disjunction_elim (P Q R : Prop) (hPQ : P → R) (hQR : Q → R) (hOr : P ∨ Q) : R
proof:
rcases hOr with (hP | hQ)
· exact hPQ hP
· exact hQR hQ

name: contrapositive
statement: theorem contrapositive (P Q : Prop) (h : P → Q) : ¬Q → ¬P
proof:
intro hnQ
intro hP
apply hnQ
apply h
exact hP

name: equality_symmetry
statement: theorem equality_symmetry (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : b = a

name: equality_trans
statement: theorem equality_trans (a b c : ℝ) (hab : a = b) (hbc : b = c) : a = c

name: have_intermediate
statement: theorem have_intermediate (n : ℕ) (h : n = 5) : n + 3 = 8
proof:
have hsum : n + 3 = 5 + 3 := by rw [h]
have hcalc : 5 + 3 = 8 := by norm_num
rw [hsum, hcalc]

name: refine_with_congr
statement: theorem refine_with_congr (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : a + 1 = b + 1
proof: refine congrArg (fun x : ℝ => x + 1) h

name: cases_on_bool
statement: theorem cases_on_bool (b : Bool) : b = true ∨ b = false
proof:
cases b
· exact Or.inr rfl
· exact Or.inl rfl

name: induction_identity_nat
statement: theorem induction_identity_nat (n : ℕ) : n + 0 = n
proof:
induction n with
| zero => rfl
| succ n ih =>
  simp [Nat.succ_add, ih]

name: induction_sum_zero
statement: theorem induction_sum_zero (n : ℕ) : 0 + n = n

name: induction_add_assoc
statement: theorem induction_add_assoc (n m k : ℕ) : (n + m) + k = n + (m + k)

name: induction_succ_add
statement: theorem induction_succ_add (n m : ℕ) : Nat.succ n + m = Nat.succ (n + m)
proof:
induction m with
| zero => rfl
| succ m ih =>
  simp [Nat.succ_add, ih]

name: induction_mul_zero
statement: theorem induction_mul_zero (n : ℕ) : n * 0 = 0
proof:
induction n with
| zero => rfl
| succ n ih =>
  simp [Nat.succ_mul, ih]

name: rewrite_hypothesis
statement: theorem rewrite_hypothesis (a b c : ℝ) (h : a = b) : a + c = b + c

name: rewrite_both_sides
statement: theorem rewrite_both_sides (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : a^2 - b^2 = 0

name: simp_add_comm
statement: theorem simp_add_comm (a b c : ℝ) : a + b + c = a + c + b

name: simp_mul_comm
statement: theorem simp_mul_comm (a b c : ℝ) : a * b * c = a * c * b

name: rw_at_target
statement: theorem rw_at_target (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : b + a = 2*a

name: quadratic_discriminant
statement: theorem quadratic_discriminant (a b x : ℝ) : (a*x + b)^2 = a^2*x^2 + 2*a*b*x + b^2

name: trinomial_expansion
statement: theorem trinomial_expansion (x y z : ℝ) : (x + y + z)^2 = x^2 + y^2 + z^2 + 2*x*y + 2*x*z + 2*y*z

name: cauchy_schwarz_simple
statement: theorem cauchy_schwarz_simple (x y : ℝ) : (x + y)^2 ≤ 2*(x^2 + y^2)

name: triangle_inequality_sq
statement: theorem triangle_inequality_sq (a b : ℝ) : (a + b)^2 ≤ 2*(a^2 + b^2)

name: square_diff_inequality
statement: theorem square_diff_inequality (x y : ℝ) (hxy : x ≥ y) : x^2 + y^2 ≥ 2*x*y
